arts.ttl: Wolves v Liverpool: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Wolves v Liverpool: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: 'One thing I noticed' - Arne Slot on Liverpool title hopes as Premier League spending point made
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he is more than happy for Liverpool to be underestimated this season as the Reds boss makes Premier League spending point

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: 22-year-old midfielder 'scouted' despite severe injury
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly show an interest in signing 22-year-old Freiburg midfielder Merlin Rohl, who only just extended his contract with the German giants.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers Liverpool reality check after Premier League title snub
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot was speaking ahead of the Reds' trip to Wolves on Saturday as he discussed their fine start to the season and early title predictions about rivals

arts.ttl: Arne Slot tells Liverpool to be wary of 'unlucky' Wolves despite the Reds' absurd record against bottom-half teams... and is happy to go under the radar in title race with Man City and Arsenal
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Arne Slot urged Liverpool fans not to take three points for granted at bottom club Wolves Saturday as the Premier League's financial dominance means every opponent is a threat.

LB: Andy Robertson - The 30-year-old will continue as Liverpool's starting left-back in the Premier League but will also hope for some Champions League game time next week when Bologna visit Anfield. The Reds have scored 11 goals in three games since suffering their first defeat under the Dutchman against Nottingham Forest, with positive starts in both the Champions League and Carabao Cup complimenting their current rank of second in England's top flight.

arts.ttl: Wolves hit by mass virus outbreak as several stars miss training just one day ahead of tough test against Liverpool
arts.sum: Still searching for their first win, Wolves host an in-form Reds, who have won all three of their away games this evening - on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Alisson shares emotional message as Liverpool star reveals true motivation
arts.sum: The Liverpool number one opened up in an interview with former Premier League-winning and England 'keeper Joe Hart

arts.ttl: Newcastle 'agree contract extension' with Arsenal & Liverpool target
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reported to have struck a deal to extend the contract of winger Anthony Gordon amid interest in the England international from both Arsenal and Chelsea. As the transfer window closed, Arsenal emerged as long-term admirers of Gordon but Newcastle officials made it clear they had plans to extend the 23-year-old's contract.

arts.ttl: Liverpool want 'world class' ex-Chelsea star as Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool want 'world class' ex-Chelsea star as Salah replacement After the Reds’ 3-0 win over Manchester United at the start of September, Salah told Sky Sports : “I had a good summer and had a long time to myself to try to stay positive because as you know it's my last year at the club.
